instruction: 把候选抽取策略改成：每次打开 F4 时，优先从不同稀有度中各抽一个候选，避免同一轮出现重复稀有度；若可用稀有度不足，再按现有权重补齐剩余槽位；已获得条目仍不得再次出现，并保留现有触发键、桥接、事件通道和 UI 交互。

patchPlan.summary: Replace drawForSelection method to implement tier-diversity-first selection: draw one candidate from each distinct rarity tier before falling back to weighted random for remaining slots. Preserve duplicatePolicy=forbid behavior and session state integration.

operations.reason: Replace the entire drawForSelection method generation block to implement tier-diversity-first selection policy per F4 trigger requirements
